analysis.repo_summary: The Azure CLI is a cross-platform command-line tool for managing Azure resources and services.
analysis.feasibility_notes: Testing involves running Python code snippets within the Azure CLI development environment and observing the changes in `az help` output, which is straightforward.

scored_prs.title: [Storage] `az storage account create/update`, `az storage account network-rule add/remove`: Support IPv6 preview

analysis.pr_summary: This PR adds IPv6 preview support to Azure Storage account creation, update, and network rule management commands.
analysis.repo_summary: The Azure CLI is a cross-platform command-line tool for managing Azure resources.
analysis.feasibility_notes: Testing requires an Azure subscription to provision storage accounts and configure network rules with IPv6 addresses, then verifying the configuration using the updated CLI commands.

scored_prs.title: [Compute] `az vm host`: Add commands to support getting possible resize options and resizing dedicated host

analysis.pr_summary: This PR adds new commands to the Azure CLI to support listing possible resize options for dedicated hosts and resizing them.
analysis.repo_summary: The Azure CLI is a cross-platform command-line tool for managing Azure resources.
analysis.feasibility_notes: Testing requires an Azure subscription with dedicated hosts provisioned, and involves executing the new CLI commands to list resize options and perform actual resize operations.

scored_prs.title: [Storage] `az storage account blob-service-properties cors-rule`: New command group to manage blob cors rules

analysis.pr_summary: This PR introduces a new command group, `az storage account blob-service-properties cors-rule`, to manage blob CORS rules via Azure control plane APIs.
analysis.repo_summary: The Azure CLI is a cross-platform command-line tool for managing Azure resources.
analysis.feasibility_notes: Testing requires an Azure subscription with a storage account, then executing the new CLI commands to manage blob CORS rules and verifying their effect.

scored_prs.title: {Core} Drop `msrestazure` managed identity authentication

analysis.repo_summary: The Azure CLI is a cross-platform command-line tool for managing Azure resources.
analysis.feasibility_notes: Reproducing and testing locally requires setting up an Azure CLI development environment and thoroughly testing various managed identity authentication scenarios.

analysis.feasibility_notes: Testing requires setting up the Azure CLI development environment and an Azure subscription with resources across different subscriptions to verify the cross-subscription ID functionality.

analysis.feasibility_notes: Reproducing and testing locally would involve running `az disk create --help` and verifying the updated message content, possibly creating a disk to ensure functionality remains correct.
